## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / milestone progress

## Checklist
- [ ] `ruff format backend/` (code is formatted)
- [ ] `ruff check backend/` (no lint errors)
- [ ] `pytest` (all tests pass)
- [ ] New non-trivial logic has tests
- [ ] If a migration was added, `db/schema.sql` was updated to match
